name: Bank
description:
High-fidelity, web-based experiential learning platform designed specifically for Corporate L&D and Leadership Development. It transforms complex financial concepts into an immersive, competitive environment where participants assume the roles of Bank Board Directors.

The simulation challenges teams to manage the holistic performance of a financial institution over multiple fiscal years, forcing them to balance short-term profitability with long-term strategic health.

name: FMCG
description: High-velocity, web-based business simulation designed for Corporate L&D within the consumer goods, retail, and manufacturing sectors. It places participants in the "hot seat" as Category Managers or Brand Directors, tasked with launching, scaling, and defending a product portfolio in a hyper-competitive retail landscape. The simulation focuses on the delicate balance between operational efficiency, brand health, and retailer relationships.
